name: SoundCloud
description: Registers a soundcloud tool that downloads a SoundCloud URL with soundcloud-dl and returns the downloaded file path.

downloaderCommand.description: soundcloud-dl executable. The upstream command usage is: <binary> <url> [flags]. Avoid bare sc on Windows because it usually resolves to Service Control.

downloaderArgs.description: Arguments passed to soundcloud-dl after URL and --download-path.

downloadPathFlag.description: Flag used by soundcloud-dl to choose where media files are stored.

downloaderForce.description: Passes --force to overwrite an existing file in the target directory.

downloaderSocksProxy.description: Passes --socks-proxy to the downloader when a SOCKS5 proxy is required.

tempRoot.description: Optional parent directory for per-call media temp directories. Defaults to the OS temp directory under openclaw-soundcloud.
